data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of showing availability in variable chunks. However, the linked use case only mentions that clients can select durations from 1 hour to 4 hours, which does not explicitly confirm that availability is displayed in variable chunks. This indicates a gap in the evidence provided, as it does not demonstrate the required feature of variable availability representation.
gaps: The system does not demonstrate how availability is shown in variable chunks.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
